.dockerignore.general_idea: The .github directory is removed from .dockerignore to allow CI configuration files to be included in the Docker build context.

.github/ci-settings.xml.general_idea: Change the SonarQube server URL from a public university instance to a local development machine address.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Removed the explicit JDK 8 setup step as the build now relies on a Docker container for the Java environment.
Removed the Maven package caching step, likely due to the switch to a Docker-based build or self-hosted runner performance issues.
Changed the build command to use a shell script (`./mvn.sh`) which presumably invokes Maven inside a Docker container.
Added Microsoft Teams notifications for build success and failure using a specific GitHub Action.
.github/workflows/ci.yml.human_impl: Added `jdcargile/ms-teams-notification@v1.3` steps with `if: ${{ success() }}` and `if: ${{ failure() }}`.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Corrected the Maven site deployment command syntax in the CI workflow.
.github/workflows/ci.yml.human_impl: Changed `run: ./mvn.sh site:site site:deploy` to `run: ./mvn.sh site:site site-deploy`.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Maven build stage base image to a custom repository to ensure compatibility or availability.
Remove environment variable definitions for Bintray credentials which are no longer used.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed ARG BINTRAY_USERNAME, ENV BINTRAY_USERNAME, ARG BINTRAY_API_KEY, ENV BINTRAY_API_KEY

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the path to the Maven settings file to reflect a new directory structure for CI configuration.

build/build.sh.general_idea: Removes build arguments for Bintray credentials as the artifact repository is being migrated away from Bintray.
Adds a build argument to pass the SonarQube token into the Docker build for code quality analysis.
Documents the required environment variables for the build script to function correctly.
build/build.sh.human_impl: ## MAKE SURE YOU HAVE enviroment variables ...

mvn.sh.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from an OpenJ9 JDK 11 variant to an AdoptOpenJDK 16 variant to align with the target JDK version.
Replace short-form Docker CLI flags with their long-form equivalents for better readability and standard compliance.
Mount the host's SSH directory into the container to enable secure Git operations or artifact uploads.
Mount the host's git configuration into the container to preserve user identity and settings for Git commands.
Replace the direct user ID mapping with environment variables and run the Maven command as a specific non-root user using runuser to improve security and compatibility with the new image.
mvn.sh.human_impl: --env PUID=`id -u` -e PGID=`id -g` ... runuser --user user --group user -- mvn
